title: Useful Allays
description: It's like a level 1 beacon with wings!
body:
# Useful Allays

Enhances Allays by allowing them to provide beneficial effects to nearby players based on the items they are holding. It's like a level 1 beacon with wings!

## Features

When an Allay holds one of the following items, it will grant the corresponding effect to all players within a 14-block radius:

- **Sugar**: Speed
- **Rabbit Foot**: Jump Boost
- **Ghast Tears**: Regeneration
- **Phantom Membrane**: Slow Falling
- **Golden Carrot**: Night Vision
- **Pufferfish**: Water Breathing
- **Blaze Powder**: Strength
- **Magma Cream**: Fire Resistance
- **Quartz**: Haste
- **Glowstone**: Glowing
- **Shulker Shell**: Levitation
- **Turtule Helmet**: Resistance 3 and Slowness 2

The datapack checks every 3 seconds for Allays holding these items and applies the effects accordingly.

## Usage

- Spawn or find an Allay in your world.
- Give the Allay one of the special items.
- Stand within 14 blocks of the Allay to receive the effect.
- The effect refreshes every 3 seconds as long as the Allay holds the item.
